message:
test(fixtures): Add real ONNX model fixture replacing placeholder

Add a minimal valid ONNX identity model (115 bytes) to the model test
fixtures directory. This replaces the synthetic placeholder approach
with a real ONNX model sourced from the official ONNX test data
(Apache-2.0 licensed).

Per the project's no-mock policy documented in TESTING.md and the
fixtures README, tests should use real fixtures with documented
provenance rather than synthetic data. This model enables proper
testing of model installation state detection without mocking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
